Appointing Reciver; Temporary Restraining Order; And Order To Show Cause Why Preliminary Injunction Should Not Be Issued And Receiver Be Confirmed
Off Calendar May-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES H. ABRAMS, TEL. NO. 981-1400 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Order To Show Cause Why Preliminary Injunction Should Not Be Issued And Receiver Be Confirmed - APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER IS GRANTED AND THAT THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AS TO THE DEFENDANTS SHALL CONTINUE IN FULL FORCE AS A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION PENDING TRIAL ON THE MERITS OF THIS MATTER. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Rhonda Fung, CSR # 4819 =301/PHA
